title: TPSChecker
description: Check your server's lag easily with some commands!
body:
**Check your server's lag easily with some commands!**

Commands

- `/tps` - Current server tick rate with color-coded status indicators
- `/mspt` - Milliseconds per tick measurement for performance analysis
- `/ping {player}` - Network latency monitoring for individual players
- `/memory` - Real-time RAM usage
- `/uptime` - Server runtime tracking
- `/serverstats` - Everything shown in one command
